Enum Class AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType>
neqsim.thermo.util.amines.AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType>, Constable
Enclosing class:
AmineHeatOfAbsorption
public static enum AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType extends Enum<AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType>
Supported amine types for heat of absorption calculation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    AMDEA
    Activated MDEA (MDEA + Piperazine blend).
    DEA
    Diethanolamine (secondary amine).
    MDEA
    Methyldiethanolamine (tertiary amine).
    MEA
    Monoethanolamine (primary amine).

  • Enum Constant Details

    • MEA

      public static final AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType MEA
      Monoethanolamine (primary amine).

    • DEA

      public static final AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType DEA
      Diethanolamine (secondary amine).

    • MDEA

      public static final AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType MDEA
      Methyldiethanolamine (tertiary amine).

    • AMDEA

      public static final AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType AMDEA
      Activated MDEA (MDEA + Piperazine blend).

    • AmineType

      private AmineType(String name, double molarMass, double maxLoading)
      Constructor for AmineType enum.
      Parameters:
      name - display name
      molarMass - molar mass in g/mol
      maxLoading - maximum practical CO2 loading (mol CO2/mol amine)

    • valueOf

      public static AmineHeatOfAbsorption.AmineType valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
